name: yibi-stack
description: Agentic skill stack for Claude Code: bash hygiene, Spectra/OpenSpec methodology, PR review workflows, TDD, and productivity tools.

plugins.name: bash-hygiene
plugins.description: Bash anti-pattern detection for Claude Code agents: AP1 overly complex commands, AP2 Unicode in bash strings, shell quoting hygiene, irreversible operation boundaries.

plugins.name: sdd
plugins.description: Spec-Driven Development: Spectra amplifier methodology, qa-test-design framework, OpenSpec change-management templates for Claude Code agents.

plugins.name: growth
plugins.description: Session continuity and knowledge retention: mycelium, learn skill, handover/newjob slash commands for Claude Code agents.

plugins.name: pr-flow
plugins.description: Full PR workflow: review cycles, retrospective, bump-version, claude-md-prune, and PR slash commands for Claude Code agents.

plugins.name: 3rd-tools
plugins.description: Third-party AI tool integrations: Codex CLI wrapper, agy, and Gemini model verification for Claude Code agents.

plugins.name: tdd
plugins.description: Test-Driven Development methodology: Kent Beck TDD, Flutter TDD, and CI triage skills for Claude Code agents.

plugins.name: util
plugins.description: Utility tools: local port manager and debug slash command for Claude Code agents.

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Writing skills for Claude Code agents: AI slop detection, text analysis, and writing quality improvement.
